sections.paragraph:
Original: צב

Transliteration: tsâb

Phonetic: tsawb

BDB Definition:

  1. a carrying vehicle, litter, covered wagon
  2. an unclean lizard
    1. perhaps a tortoise
    2. perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from an unused root meaning to establish

TWOT entry: 1866a,1867a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
